basic_details.job_title: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya (DHSGSU) Recruitment 2026: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 28 years (relaxable upto 5 years in case of SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: Relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./ M. Tech. in Plant Sciences/ Botany/ Biotechnology/Life Science (with 55% and above) and have qualified NET/GATE/or any National level exam conducted by DST/DBT/DRDO/ICAR/ICMR.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc./ M. Tech. in Plant Sciences/ Botany/ Biotechnology/Life Science (with 55% and above) Qualified NET/GATE/or any National level exam conducted by DST/DBT/DRDO/ICAR/ICMR. Experience in the relevant research work will be given preference.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA (first two years), Rs. 42,000/- pm + HRA (third year)
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA for the first two years Rs. 42,000/- pm + HRA for the third year

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview (offline/online). Candidates must bring their original documents on the day of the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHSGSU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc./ M. Tech. in Plant Sciences/ Botany/ Biotechnology/Life Science (with 55% and above) Qualified NET/GATE/or any National level exam conducted by DST/DBT/DRDO/ICAR/ICMR. Experience in the relevant research work will be given preference.

content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA for the first two years Rs. 42,000/- pm + HRA for the third year

DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview (offline/online). Candidates must bring their original documents on the day of the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHSGSU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position is 04-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc./ M. Tech. in Plant Sciences/ Botany/ Biotechnology/Life Science with at least 55% marks and have qualified NET/GATE or any equivalent national-level examination.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years. However, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation of up to 5 years is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- pm + HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the DHSGSU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be sent via email to the specified address, along with a detailed CV and self-attested copies of relevant documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ANRF/ECRG/2025/002778/LS /130.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this JRF position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based research position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya located?
faq.answer: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya is located in Sagar, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 470003.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit a detailed CV and self-attested copies of all relevant documents, including educational certificates and any experience certificates.
